summary: Iteration 20: SLA Monitoring & Compliance Testing Complete. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 SLA deliverables verified: (1) SLA Dashboard Widget with 3 metric cards + donut/trend chart, (2) SLA Breach Bell with dropdown and Ack buttons, (3) SLA Config Tab in Settings with RBI Defaults, (4) SLA Status column in screening table.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Login with shyam@rudrik.io / Assword@0231
GET /api/sla-metrics returns 200 with screening_turnaround, case_resolution, escalation, weekly_trend, donut data
GET /api/sla-metrics requires authentication (401 without auth)
GET /api/sla-metrics screening_turnaround has avg_hours, target_hrs, on_time, breached, total, compliance_pct
GET /api/sla-metrics case_resolution has avg_hours, target_hrs, resolved_on_time, total, compliance_pct
GET /api/sla-metrics escalation has count, sar_target_hrs, pending
GET /api/sla-metrics weekly_trend is array with week and compliance fields
GET /api/sla-metrics donut has on_time, breached, pending counts
GET /api/sla-breaches returns 200 with breaches list and unacknowledged count
GET /api/sla-breaches breach items have id, type, severity, title, description, breached_at, acknowledged
GET /api/sla-breaches requires authentication
PUT /api/sla-breaches/{id}/acknowledge returns 200 with confirmation message
PUT /api/sla-breaches/{id}/acknowledge requires authentication
PUT /api/settings/sla saves SLA config with all 5 fields + auto_escalate + template
PUT /api/settings/sla accepts custom values and RBI defaults
PUT /api/settings/sla requires authentication
GET /api/settings includes sla_config section
GET /api/settings sla_config has RBI defaults: screening_target_hrs=2, case_resolution_target_hrs=168, str_filing_target_days=7, edd_completion_target_days=7, sar_filing_target_hrs=24
GET /api/screenings returns sla_status for each record (on_time, at_risk, breached, pending)
GET /api/screenings returns sla_elapsed_hrs for completed screenings
SLA metrics use configured targets from settings
Dashboard shows SLA Compliance Monitor widget with LIVE badge
Dashboard shows 3 SLA metric cards: Screening Turnaround (1.9h), Case Resolution (4d), Pending Escalations (2)
Dashboard shows SLA Adherence donut chart with On Time/Breached/Pending
Dashboard shows Compliance Score (74%) with Weekly Compliance Trend bars
Sidebar shows SLA Breach Bell with unacknowledged count badge (3)
Bell click opens dropdown with 5 breach alerts
Breach alerts show severity badges (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM)
Ack button works - count decreases from 3 to 2 after acknowledging
Settings page has SLA Targets tab
SLA Tab shows RBI Compliance Defaults card with Active button
SLA Tab shows 5 configurable fields with RBI notes
Apply RBI Defaults button sets all fields to RBI values
Save SLA Configuration button persists changes (shows Saved)
Auto-Escalation on Breach toggle works
Screening table shows SLA column header
Screening table shows SLA status badges (ON TIME in green)
critical_code_review_comments: SLA metrics endpoint uses mock data with random.seed(42) for deterministic demo - MOCKED as expected
SLA breaches endpoint returns hardcoded mock alerts - MOCKED as expected
SLA config correctly seeded with RBI defaults on startup via migration
Screening SLA status computed dynamically based on created_at/completed_at and configured target
Frontend correctly displays all SLA components with proper data-testid attributes
Donut chart uses correct colors: green (#10b981) for on_time, deep crimson (#8B0000) for breached, gold (#FFD700) for pending
seed_data_creation: None - SLA config seeded via migration on startup. Mock breach alerts and metrics generated dynamically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA Monitoring & Compliance fully tested. Key data-testid attributes: sla-widget, sla-turnaround-card, sla-resolution-card, sla-escalation-card, sla-breach-bell, sla-breach-count, sla-breach-dropdown, breach-item-{id}, ack-breach-{id}, sla-settings-tab, apply-rbi-defaults-btn, sla-input-{field}, sla-save-btn, sla-auto-escalate-toggle, sla-status-{id}. RBI defaults: screening 2hrs, case resolution 168hrs (7 days), STR 7 days, EDD 7 days, SAR 24hrs. SLA metrics and breach alerts use MOCK data for demo purposes.

mocked_apis.SLA Breaches: MOCKED - GET /api/sla-breaches returns hardcoded mock breach alerts
